repo.description: COVID-Net Open Source Initiative - Models and Data for COVID-19 Detection in Chest CT

terms.context_snippet: **Note: The COVID-Net CT models provided here [as part of the COVID-Net Initiative](http://www.covid-net.ml) are intended to be used as reference models that can be built upon and enhanced as new data becomes available. They are currently at a research stage and not yet intended…
